_meta.description: Canonical field registry stub. The authoritative runtime module is server/fieldRegistry.js.
notes: This JSON file is a reference stub only.
The live registry data and all helper functions live in server/fieldRegistry.js.
Do NOT add field definitions here — add them to server/fieldRegistry.js FIELDS array.
Legacy sources (forms/*.js, desktop_agent/field_maps/*.json, real_quantum_agent/field_maps/commercial.json) remain operational but are TRANSITIONAL.
Do not extend legacy sources — all new fields must be added to server/fieldRegistry.js first.
